name: Vor's Prize
subtitle: Captain Vor hunts you across the forests of Earth.
description: An Ascaris device has been implanted into your Warframe by Captain Vor. You must repair your Orbiter, find the cure, and confront Vor before the device takes total control.

arcs.name: Repair the Orbiter
arcs.description: Your Orbiter was looted during the attack. Recover the missing Segments from Grineer forces on Earth.

missions.name: Restore Ship Comms
missions.subtitle: Outreach
missions.wiki_note: Spy mission — 1 data vault. Enemies: Frontier Lancers and Troopers, lvl 1-3. No loot or affinity. Player cannot die.

intro: Lotus: "Your Orbiter's communications array is offline, Operator."
Lotus: "A Grineer outpost at E Prime holds a compatible Comms Segment. Break into their data vault and retrieve it."
Ordis: "Operator, I — _there is something wrong with me_ — I await your return."
mid: Lotus: "Grineer patrol detected. Stay unseen if you can — the data vault is just ahead."
Vor (transmission): "I know you're out there, Tenno. The Ascaris grows stronger with every passing moment."
outro: Lotus: "Comms Segment secured. Return to the Orbiter and install it."
Ordis: "Operator! The — _marvelous Operator_ — the communications array is back online! Ordis is... pleased."

missions.name: Liberate the Arms Dealer
missions.subtitle: Familiar Faces
missions.wiki_note: Rescue mission — free Darvo from Grineer prison. Enemies: Wardens (600 HP / 500 Armor) and Lancers, lvl 2-4. No loot or affinity. Player cannot die.

intro: Lotus: "A black-market arms dealer named Darvo has been captured by the Grineer."
Lotus: "He has a Foundry Segment you need to craft the Ascaris Negator. Rescue him."
Lotus: "This is the prison block. If you can avoid detection by the Warden, it may be easier to get Darvo out."
mid: Darvo (captive): "Hey! Hey, is someone there? Get me out of here!"
Lotus: "Watch the Wardens — they are heavily armored and will not go down easily."
outro: Darvo: "Ha! I knew someone would come. The name's Darvo. You need something, you come to me."
Darvo: "Take this Foundry Segment — call it a thank-you. Build the Ascaris Negator. It's your only way to stop Vor."

missions.name: Locate the Foundry Segment
missions.subtitle: Oppression
missions.wiki_note: Exterminate mission — recover Foundry Segment, then eliminate all Grineer. Enemies: Frontier Lancers, Troopers, Heavy Gunners, lvl 3-5. Rewards: Damaged Pressure Point + Fury mods.

intro: Lotus: "Grineer forces have occupied this outpost. The Foundry Segment is inside — fight through them."
Vor (transmission): "You are still alive. Impressive. But the Ascaris tightens its grip."
mid: Lotus: "Heavy Gunner unit detected — those Gorgons hit hard. Take cover and prioritize them."
Lotus: "Foundry Segment located. Eliminate the remaining Grineer and extract."
outro: Lotus: "Well done. Install the Foundry Segment in your Orbiter and craft the Ascaris Negator."
Ordis: "New components detected! Ordis is — _delighted_ — ready to build, Operator."

arcs.name: Hunt Captain Vor
arcs.description: The Ascaris Negator is ready. Track Vor across the surface of Earth and end his threat once and for all.

missions.name: Raid Corpus Resource Caches
missions.subtitle: Loot & Pillage
missions.wiki_note: Mobile Defense / Cache mission — collect Corpus supply caches held by Grineer. Enemies: Frontier Lancers and Troopers, lvl 4-6. Rewards: Damaged Steel Fiber + Enemy Sense mods.

intro: Lotus: "The Ascaris Negator blueprint requires resources. Corpus supply caches at Gaia hold what you need."
Lotus: "Grineer have seized the area. Clear them out and secure the caches."
mid: Vor (transmission): "You've been busy. But every moment you delay, the Ascaris digs deeper."
Lotus: "Cache secured. Two more to go — move quickly."
outro: Lotus: "All caches secured. Return to the Orbiter — the Ascaris Negator can now be built."
Ordis: "Ordis has received the resource data. Construction of the Ascaris Negator is — _imminent_ — underway."

missions.name: Obtain the Nav Segment
missions.subtitle: Navigation Recovery
missions.wiki_note: Sabotage mission — destroy Grineer fuel lines, extract the Nav Segment, escape before explosion. Enemies: Frontier Lancers and Heavy Gunners, lvl 5-7. Rewards: Damaged Stretch + Intensify mods.

intro: Lotus: "A Grineer installation at Pacific holds a Navigation Segment. It will allow us to track Vor's movements."
Lotus: "Destroy their fuel lines, grab the Nav Segment, and get out before the whole thing blows."
mid: Vor (transmission): "You dare come to my installation? The Janus Key will end this — soon."
Lotus: "Fuel lines destroyed. Nav Segment acquired — extract now!"
outro: Lotus: "Nav Segment secured. We've pinpointed Vor's position — Cambria."
Lotus: "He's waiting for you. End this, Operator."

missions.name: Confront Captain Vor
missions.subtitle: Faceoff
missions.wiki_note: Assassination mission — boss fight against Captain Vor. Vor has 3 Sphere Shield phases (at 75%/50%/25% HP) during which he is invulnerable and spawns Frontier Lancer reinforcements. Uses Seer pistol, Janus Key beam (Radiation damage), Nervos Mines, and Cronus melee. Level 8 mission, Vor spawns at level 10.

intro: Vor: "At last. You've arrived. I've been looking forward to this, Tenno."
Vor: "The Janus Key — ancient Orokin technology — fused with Grineer engineering. A masterpiece."
Lotus: "He's activated the Janus Key, Operator. Do NOT let him use the Sphere Shield — take him down fast."
phase_shield: Vor: "You cannot hurt me, Tenno! The Janus Key protects me!"
Lotus: "His shield is active — the Janus Key is powering it. Kill his reinforcements to break it!"
phase_break: Lotus: "Shield down! Focus fire on Vor — now!"
mid: Vor: "Feel the power of the Void, Tenno! The Janus Key answers to ME!"
Vor: "You fight well. But the Ascaris... it is almost complete."
outro: Lotus: "The Ascaris is deactivating, Operator. It's over."
Ordis: "Operator — _the Ascaris is gone_ — you are free. Ordis is... relieved."
